image.title: NAC Mazza, E Ricci, D Marchetti, L Fontanesi, S Di Giandomenico, MC Verrocchio, P Roma

item.title: How Personality Relates to Distress in Parents during the Covid-19 Lockdown: The Mediating Role of Child's Emotional and Behavioral Difficulties and the Moderating Effect of Living with Other People.
